uplink.description: Status report - vibration detected, 3.0 V battery
uplink._note: Upstream example input (status byte[4]=1 => vibration). Upstream emits Volt:3, status:1; we normalize battery=3.0 V and action.motion.detected=true. Battery byte 30 = 3.0 V (0.1 V units).

uplink.description: Status report - no vibration, low battery
uplink._note: Battery byte 158 = 0x9E: high bit (0x80) set => lowBattery, low 7 bits 0x1E = 30 => 3.0 V. status byte[4]=0 => no vibration => action.motion.detected=false.
Upstream example input: reportType byte[2]=0x00 is a device-info/startup frame (SWver/HWver/Datecode) with no measurement -> error.

uplink.description: Config report response on fPort 7 (no measurement)
uplink._note: Upstream example input: fPort 7 carries config responses (ConfigReportRsp), not a measurement -> error.
